feature: Security-by-Default signals (MAZ, ISD, HSC) for vibe-coding detection
evidence: 67 new targeted tests across 3 test files (test_missing_authorization.py, test_hardcoded_secret.py, test_insecure_default.py) covering true-positives, true-negatives, and edge cases. Full regression suite: 1176 passed, 0 failed. Self-analysis on drift codebase completes without crashes. SARIF output validated with CWE helpUri generation.

MAZ_missing_authorization.impact: Detects HTTP/API endpoints without auth checks (CWE-862). Supports FastAPI, Django, Flask, Starlette, Sanic decorators. 18 auth decorator patterns, body-level auth detection, CBV mixin recognition.

HSC_hardcoded_secret.impact: Detects hardcoded secrets, API tokens, credentials (CWE-798). Multi-layer: secret variable regex, known token prefixes (ghp_, sk-, AKIA, xoxb-), Shannon entropy analysis. Safe-value exclusion for env vars and config lookups.

ISD_insecure_default.impact: Detects insecure configuration defaults (CWE-1188). Covers DEBUG=True, ALLOWED_HOSTS=['*'], CORS_ALLOW_ALL, insecure cookies, SSL redirect disabled, verify=False. Supports drift:ignore-security suppression.

ast_parser_auth_extension.impact: Extended endpoint fingerprinting with 18 auth decorators, body-level auth name/attr detection, auth_mechanism field in fingerprint dict.

sarif_cwe_helpuri.impact: SARIF rules now include helpUri linking to CWE MITRE pages for security findings with CWE metadata.
